title: rubus flexilis
intro: Rubus flexilis, also known as flexible raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to Western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus flexilis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting wound healing. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
